qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_mot_rechazo as oi_mot_rechazo, t0.c_mot_rechazo as c_mot_rechazo, t0.d_mot_rechazo as d_mot_rechazo, SEC.policy, t0.c_mot_rechazo as CODE, t0.d_mot_rechazo as TEXT FROM SEL15_MOT_RECHAZO as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Motivos_Rechazo.MOT_RECHAZO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_mot_rechazo LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_mot_rechazo asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_mot_rechazo as oi_mot_rechazo, SEC.policy FROM SEL15_MOT_RECHAZO as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Motivos_Rechazo.MOT_RECHAZO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_mot_rechazo LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_mot_rechazo asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Motivos_Rechazo.MOT_RECHAZO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Motivos_Rechazo.MOT_RECHAZO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL15_MOT_RECHAZO.oi_mot_rechazo) as CNT from SEL15_MOT_RECHAZO Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL15_MOT_RECHAZO.oi_mot_rechazo={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL15_MOT_RECHAZO.d_mot_rechazo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL15_MOT_RECHAZO.c_mot_rechazo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
